features.title: Fluent Builder
features.description: Chain headings, paragraphs, lists, tables, code blocks, and callouts with a clean API.

features.title: Typed AST
features.description: Parse markdown into a fully typed block/inline document model with source spans.

features.title: HTML Rendering
features.description: Render to HTML fragments or full documents with customizable output.

features.title: Multiple Profiles
features.description: OfficeIMO, CommonMark, GitHub Flavored Markdown, and Portable reader profiles.

features.title: Zero Dependencies
features.description: No external dependencies. Fully AOT and trimming safe.

features.title: Document Transforms
features.description: Post-parse transforms and extension API for custom inline/block parsers.

relatedPackages.name: OfficeIMO.MarkdownRenderer.Wpf
relatedPackages.description: WPF desktop control for Markdown rendering
